creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
- Update to 4.7.2.

I have decided to remove the options that were on this port and treat it as
similar to the real MinGW gcc.  As such, I have tried to use similar configure
args as their gcc.  A few differences are the lack of ada support and using
some configure args copied from lang/gcc47.  I have also removed support for
the GNU Java compiler, partially due to issues getting it to compile as a
cross-compiler and partially due to MinGW not having it in the first place.

Removed file(s):
- files/java-patch-libjava--Makefile.in
- files/java-patch-libjava--classpath--resource--Makefile.in
- files/java-patch-libjava-gnu-java-security-jce-prng-natVMSecureRandomWin32.cc

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: ports)
